parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: Company ID in which the search needs to be performed

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search term for the user is matched based on the user full name, email or phone

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: No of results to be skipped before returning the result

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: No of results to be limited before returning the result

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location ID in which the search needs to be performed

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the users to be filtered in the search

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Role of the users to be filtered in the search

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of User IDs to be filtered in the search

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The field on which sort is applied in which the results need to be sorted. Default is based on the first and last name

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: The direction in which the results need to be sorted

parameters.name: enabled2waySync
parameters.description: Filter users by whether 2-way sync is enabled

post.description: Filter users by company ID, deleted status, and email array

info.title: Users API v3
info.description:
Documentation for users API

## API Version v3

All APIs available via `/v3` route prefix with AIP-compliant responses.

bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access.name: Authorization
Location-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Location-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account.

Agency-Access.name: Authorization
Agency-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency (OR) Private Integration Token of Agency.

Agency-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Agency-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency.

type.description: User account type (account for sub-account users, agency for agency-level users)

role.description: User role within the account (admin or user)

locationIds.description: List of location IDs the user has access to

restrictSubAccount.description: Whether the user is restricted to specific sub-accounts only

permissions.description: User permissions controlling access to various features

scopes.description: List of OAuth scopes granted to this user

roles.description: Role and access configuration for the user

deleted.description: Whether the user has been deleted

platformLanguage.description: Platform language preference for the user

users.description: List of users matching the search criteria

count.description: Total number of users matching the search criteria

emails.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses to filter users

skip.description: No of results to be skipped before returning the result

limit.description: No of results to be limited before returning the result

projection.description: Projection fields to return. Use "all" for all fields, or specify comma-separated field names. Default returns only id and email

permissions.description: User permissions controlling access to various features

scopes.description: List of OAuth scopes granted to this user

roles.description: Role and access configuration for the user

platformLanguage.description: Platform language preference for the user

companyId.description: Company/Agency ID to associate the user with

email.description: Email address of the user (used for login)

password.description:
Password for the user account. All passwords will be required to meet the following criteria:

- Minimum 12 characters
- At least one uppercase letter (A–Z)
- At least one lowercase letter (a–z)
- At least one number (0–9)
- At least one special character (e.g., !, @, #, $)

phone.description: Phone number of the user in E.164 format

type.description: User account type (account for sub-account users, agency for agency-level users)

role.description: User role within the account (admin or user)

locationIds.description: List of location IDs to assign to the user

permissions.description: User permissions controlling access to various features

scopes.description: Scopes allowed for users. Only scopes that have been passed will be enabled. Note:- If passed empty all the scopes will be get disabled

scopesAssignedToOnly.description: Assigned Scopes allowed for users. Only scopes that have been passed will be enabled. If passed empty all the assigned scopes will be get disabled

profilePhoto.description: URL of the user profile photo

twilioPhone.description: Per-location inbound Twilio number in E.164 format, keyed by location id (Call and Voicemail Inbound Number for direct Twilio, not LC Phone). Replacement semantics: if you send twilioPhone in the request body, the stored map is replaced entirely with this object (not merged). Any location id omitted from the object is removed from the saved map. Omit the twilioPhone property entirely to leave existing numbers unchanged. Send an empty object {} to clear all per-location numbers. To clear a single location only, set that location id to an empty string "".

platformLanguage.description: Platform language preference for the user

email.description: Email update is no longer supported due to security reasons.

password.description:
New password for the user account. All passwords will be required to meet the following criteria:

- Minimum 12 characters
- At least one uppercase letter (A–Z)
- At least one lowercase letter (a–z)
- At least one number (0–9)
- At least one special character (e.g., !, @, #, $)

phone.description: Phone number of the user in E.164 format

type.description: User account type (account for sub-account users, agency for agency-level users)

role.description: User role within the account (admin or user)

companyId.description: Company/Agency Id. Required for Agency Level access

locationIds.description: List of sub-account location IDs the user should have access to

permissions.description: User permissions controlling access to various features

scopes.description: Scopes allowed for users. Only scopes that have been passed will be enabled. If passed empty all the scopes will be get disabled

scopesAssignedToOnly.description: Assigned Scopes allowed for users. Only scopes that have been passed will be enabled. If passed empty all the assigned scopes will be get disabled

profilePhoto.description: URL of the user profile photo

twilioPhone.description: Per-location inbound Twilio number in E.164 format, keyed by location id (Call and Voicemail Inbound Number for direct Twilio, not LC Phone). Replacement semantics: if you send twilioPhone in the request body, the stored map is replaced entirely with this object (not merged). Any location id omitted from the object is removed from the saved map. Omit the twilioPhone property entirely to leave existing numbers unchanged. Send an empty object {} to clear all per-location numbers. To clear a single location only, set that location id to an empty string "".

platformLanguage.description: Platform language preference for the user

succeeded.description: Indicates whether the user deletion was queued successfully

message.example: Queued deleting user with e-mail john@deo.com and name John Deo. Will take effect in a few minutes.
message.description: Message describing the result of the deletion request
